message:
beads: sync issues.jsonl with in-tree bead updates

Refresh .beads/issues.jsonl so the JSONL projection matches the
current state of the local beads database after the Track-E v5
publication and the raptorq / websocket / http_client commits on
this branch. This is a plain db->jsonl sync — no bead text was
authored in this commit, it is only being replayed from the .db so
the repo stays consistent with the `br sync` workflow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
